title: Access Control
summary: Restrict access to protected functionality and data.
remediation_summary: Add role-aware authorization checks and ensure protected operations require authenticated access.

title: Audit Logging
summary: Track security-relevant access and configuration changes.
remediation_summary: Capture auditable records for sensitive access, privileged operations, and configuration changes.

title: Backup And Recovery
summary: Protect service continuity with tested backup and recovery workflows.
remediation_summary: Create tested backup schedules, recovery objectives, and restoration runbooks.

title: Consent Management
summary: Record and honor user consent requirements.
remediation_summary: Store consent decisions, expose user review paths, and block processing that lacks a valid consent basis.

title: Data Loss Prevention
summary: Reduce accidental or unauthorized data exfiltration paths.
remediation_summary: Add egress controls, data-classification-aware policies, and alerting for high-risk transfers.

title: Data Retention
summary: Apply retention and deletion rules to regulated data.
remediation_summary: Define retention windows, automate deletion workflows, and document retention policy enforcement.

title: Encryption At Rest
summary: Protect regulated data in persistent storage.
remediation_summary: Use managed encryption features or application-level encryption for regulated data stores and backups.

title: Encryption In Transit
summary: Protect regulated data over network boundaries.
remediation_summary: Use TLS and certificate management for external and internal service communication paths.

title: Incident Response
summary: Prepare escalation and breach handling workflows.
remediation_summary: Create documented response playbooks, escalation paths, and evidence collection procedures.

title: Key Management
summary: Protect cryptographic keys used by regulated systems.
remediation_summary: Use managed key storage, rotation policies, and access restrictions for encryption material.

title: Monitoring And Alerting
summary: Detect operational and security anomalies quickly.
remediation_summary: Emit actionable telemetry, define alert thresholds, and route incidents to on-call owners.

title: Network Segmentation
summary: Limit lateral movement and isolate sensitive zones.
remediation_summary: Separate trusted and untrusted zones, restrict east-west traffic, and document ingress and egress policies.

title: Role-Based Access Control
summary: Grant permissions according to user roles and least privilege.
remediation_summary: Define roles, map permissions to business responsibilities, and remove broad shared privileges.

title: Secrets Management
summary: Store and rotate secrets outside source control.
remediation_summary: Move secrets into managed storage, add rotation policies, and block inline credentials in configuration.

title: Security Testing
summary: Validate security posture through repeatable testing.
remediation_summary: Run repeatable security checks in CI and track remediation for detected weaknesses.

title: Vendor Risk Review
summary: Assess external providers that handle regulated data or critical processes.
remediation_summary: Document provider controls, contract obligations, and reassessment triggers for third-party services.

title: Vulnerability Management
summary: Track and remediate known vulnerabilities in a repeatable way.
remediation_summary: Establish patch SLAs, scanning cadence, and ownership for high-risk findings.
